metadata.title: Doctor.mx | Telemedicine and Verified Doctors in Mexico | 24/7
metadata.description: Online medical consultation with verified doctors in Mexico. Secure telemedicine, HD video consultations, and Dr. Simeon - your AI health assistant. Over 500 specialists available 24/7.
metadata.keywords: telemedicine Mexico, online doctors, virtual medical consultation, verified doctors Mexico, medical video consultation, Dr Simeon, digital health Mexico, online medical appointment, certified specialists, second medical opinion
metadata.ogTitle: Doctor.mx | Telemedicine and Verified Doctors in Mexico
metadata.ogDescription: We connect patients with the best specialists in Mexico. Safe, reliable, and accessible virtual consultations.

hero.subtitle: We connect patients with the best specialists in Mexico. Safe, reliable, and accessible virtual consultations.

announcement.title: 5 FREE MEDICAL CONSULTATIONS FOR ALL MEXICANS

hero.headline: 5 Medical Consultations
hero.subheadlinePart1: Accessible healthcare for everyone. Consult with AI medical assistant as many times as you need —
hero.subheadlinePart2: . When you need a real doctor, we connect you with verified specialists.
hero.forDoctors: Are you a doctor? Join the network
hero.compliance: Medical guidance service. Does not replace in-person consultation.

chatCard.greeting: Hello! I'm your medical assistant. How can I help you today?

features.title: Digital health, human care
features.description: A platform designed to connect you with certified Mexican specialists, quickly, safely, and privately.

verified.title: Doctors with verified license
verified.description: Each specialist is validated with their professional license by SEP. Review complete profiles before booking.

video.title: HD video consultation from home
video.description: Video consultations with HD quality and secure connection. Your doctor sees and hears you as if you were in their office.

appointments.title: Appointments in less than 24 hours
appointments.description: Find real-time availability. Schedule your consultation in minutes, not weeks.

simeon.title: Dr. Simeon: your health copilot
simeon.description: Our AI assistant helps you understand symptoms and prepare questions for your doctor. It doesn't diagnose, it guides.

privacy.title: Medical-grade privacy
privacy.description: End-to-end encryption and compliance with Mexican health data protection regulations.

followup.title: Continuous follow-up
followup.description: Message your doctor before and after the consultation. Your medical history always accessible.

content.maria: I found an excellent cardiologist in 10 minutes. The video consultation was as professional as going to the office, but without spending 3 hours commuting. I've already had 4 follow-up consultations.
content.carlos: Doctor.mx allows me to attend patients from all over Mexico without being limited to my physical office. The payment system is reliable and support resolves any questions in minutes.
content.ana: I used Dr. Simeon to understand my symptoms before my consultation. It helped me prepare the right questions. The second opinion I got gave me peace of mind before deciding on my treatment.

cta.title: Your health deserves
cta.description: Over 10,000 consultations performed. Join the Mexicans who already take care of their health with Doctor.mx.
cta.forDoctors: Are you a doctor? Learn how to grow your practice
cta.footerNote: First consultation free - No commitment - Cancel anytime

footer.description: Mexico's most trusted digital health platform. We connect patients with the best certified specialists.

emergency.title: Emergency
emergency.warning: If you are experiencing a life-threatening medical emergency, call 911 immediately.
emergency.subtitle: Immediate care for urgent cases

urgentCare.title: Urgent Care
urgentCare.description: For cases that don't put life at risk but require immediate attention

emergency.disclaimer: Doctor.mx does not replace emergency services. For serious emergencies, contact 911 directly.
